message:
fix(core): add busy-retry to commit-path exclusive lock escalation

Stock SQLite applies the busy handler during both BEGIN and COMMIT lock
acquisition. FrankenSQLite only had retry logic at BEGIN time. The COMMIT
path returned Busy immediately when the exclusive lock failed, ignoring
PRAGMA busy_timeout entirely.

This adds the same exponential-backoff retry pattern to commit_journal()'s
lock escalation that already exists in begin_pager_txn_with_busy_timeout().

Closes #45

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
